zh.lifeSummary: Hannah Stoddard是John Stodder的女兒，於大約1638年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可。她於1658年5月18日與Gershom Wheelock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1690年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hannah Stoddard是John Stodder的女儿，于大约1638年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可。她于1658年5月18日与Gershom Wheelock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1690年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Stoddard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for someone who looked after a stud of horses, from Middle English and Older Scots stod(e), stud(e) ‘establishment where horses were bred’, ‘herd of stallions or mares’ + herd(e) ‘herdsman’.

English: variant of Stothard, an occupational name for a keeper of cattle or horses, from Middle English stot ‘steer, bullock’ or ‘horse’ + herd(e) ‘herdsman’. The name was probably confused with Stodeherd ‘keeper of stud-horses’ (see above).

History: The Stoddard family of Boston, MA, was introduced by Anthony Stoddard (1600–1686), who settled there in 1639. Solomon Stoddard (1643–1728/9) was a prominent Congregational clergyman in MA, the grandfather of Jonathan Edwards, and progenitor of many noted descendants.

variants.name: Stodden
meanings: perhaps occasionally a habitational name from Studding's Farm in Herstmonceux (Sussex), probably named with Old English stōd ‘stud, herd of horses’ + denn ‘pasture’. Compare Stoddard .

variants.name: Stoddart
meanings: English (Durham and Cumberland) and Scottish (Midlothian and Lanarkshire): variant of   Stoddard  .

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: Hannah Stoddard was born about 1638, in Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America as the daughter of John Stodder. She married Gershom Wheelock on 18 May 1658, in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1690.

fr.lifeSummary: Hannah Stoddard est née environ 1638, à Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, fille de John Stodder. Elle a épousé Gershom Wheelock le 18 mai 1658, à Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1690.

ja.Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクヒンガム
ja.Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Col: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクメドフィールド
ja.Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルク
ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Stoddardは約1638年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクでJohn Stodderの娘として生まれた。1658年5月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクメドフィールドでGershom Wheelockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1690年以後に死去した。

ko.Medfield,Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크
ko.Medfield,Norfolk Massachusetts Bay, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크
ko.Medfield, Suffolk, Province of Massachus: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드
ko.Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드
ko.Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 잉함
ko.Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드
ko.Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크
ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Stoddard(은)는 대략 1638년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크에서 John Stodder의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1658년 5월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드에서 Gershom Wheelock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1690년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hannah Stoddard nasceu aproximadamente 1638, em Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America filha de John Stodder. Ela casou-se com Gershom Wheelock em 18 de maio de 1658, em Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1690.

ru.lifeSummary: Hannah Stoddard родилась около 1638 г. в местности норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Её отца звали John Stodder. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gershom Wheelock 18 мая 1658 г. в местности медфиелд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1690 г.

es.lifeSummary: Hannah Stoddard nació aproximadamente 1638, en Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America como hija de John Stodder. Se casó con Gershom Wheelock el 18 de mayo de 1658, en Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1690.
